expectations.text: Frames the task as background task management rather than generic tmux usage
expectations.evidence: Leads with keeping the task running without blocking the current turn and treats the session as part of task management.
Uses `frontend-dev` as a concise and meaningful task name.
Uses PI_TMUX_SESSION and a shared session bootstrap path.
